title: Out of file descriptors: No file descriptors available; release and retry
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

<!--
Briefly describe the problem you are having in a few paragraphs.
-->

Creating a podman container of [Tandoor Recipes](https://hub.docker.com/r/vabene1111/recipes/tags), leads to many errors among the different containers which report "out of file descriptors: no file descriptors available; release and retry". I have the same exact setup running in docker just fine on another machine, but for podman it fails with this errors.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

1. Copy docker-compose.yml and .env from linux machine with docker to this machine with podman

2. Use the docker-compose plugin with docker to bring up the containers

3. tandoor-recipes-db_recipes_1 and tandoor-recipes-web_recepies_1 report this error

**Describe the results you received:**
The containers came up and error-ed out with file descriptor errors 


**Describe the results you expected:**
The container to come up and behave like under docker, with no file descriptor errors

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**
Docker-compose relevant logs:

```
tandoor_recipes-db_recipes-1     | 2022-06-17 15:21:30.927 UTC [25] LOG:  out of file descriptors: No file descriptors available; release and retry
tandoor_recipes-db_recipes-1     | 2022-06-17 15:21:30.927 UTC [25] STATEMENT:  CREATE TABLE "django_migrations" ("id" serial NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "app" varchar(255) NOT NULL, "name" varcha
r(255) NOT NULL, "applied" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL)                                                                                                                                 
tandoor_recipes-db_recipes-1     | 2022-06-17 15:21:30.928 UTC [25] ERROR:  could not stat directory "base/16384": No file descriptors available
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | /docker-entrypoint.sh: Launching /docker-entrypoint.d/20-envsubst-on-templates.sh
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | /docker-entrypoint.sh: Launching /docker-entrypoint.d/30-tune-worker-processes.sh
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | /docker-entrypoint.sh: Configuration complete; ready for start up
tandoor_recipes-db_recipes-1     | 2022-06-17 15:21:30.928 UTC [25] STATEMENT:  CREATE TABLE "django_migrations" ("id" serial NOT NULL PRIMARY KEY, "app" varchar(255) NOT NULL, "name" varcha
r(255) NOT NULL, "applied" timestamp with time zone NOT NULL)                                                                                                                                 
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: using the "epoll" event method
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: nginx/1.21.6
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: built by gcc 10.3.1 20211027 (Alpine 10.3.1_git20211027) 
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: OS: Linux 5.17.5-300.fc36.aarch64
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: getrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE): 524288:524288
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: start worker processes
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: start worker process 17
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: start worker process 18
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: start worker process 19
tandoor_recipes-nginx_recipes-1  | 2022/06/17 15:21:20 [notice] 1#1: start worker process 20
  
```
docker-compose file:
```
version: "3"                                                                                                                                                                                  
services:                                                                                                                                                                                     
  db_recipes:                                                                                                                                                                                 
    restart: always                                                                                                                                                                           
    image: postgres:11-alpine                                                                                                                                                                 
    volumes:                                                                                                                                                                                  
      - ./postgresql:/var/lib/postgresql/data                                                                                                                                                 
    env_file:                                                                                                                                                                                 
      - ./.env                                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                              
  web_recipes:                                                                                                                                                                                
    restart: always                                                                                                                                                                           
    image: vabene1111/recipes                                                                                                                                                                 
    env_file:                                                                                                                                                                                 
      - ./.env                                                                                                                                                                                
    volumes:                                                                                                                                                                                  
      - staticfiles:/opt/recipes/staticfiles                                                                                                                                                  
      - nginx_config:/opt/recipes/nginx/conf.d                                                                                                                                                
      - ./mediafiles:/opt/recipes/mediafiles                                                                                                                                                  
    depends_on:                                                                                                                                                                               
      - db_recipes                                                                                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                              
  nginx_recipes:                                                                                                                                                                              
    image: nginx:mainline-alpine                                                                                                                                                              
    restart: always                                                                                                                                                                           
    ports:                                                                                                                                                                                    
      - 8066:80                                                                                                                                                                               
    env_file:                                                                                                                                                                                 
      - ./.env                                                                                                                                                                                
    depends_on:                                                                                                                                                                               
      - web_recipes                                                                                                                                                                           
    volumes:                                                                                                                                                                                  
      - nginx_config:/etc/nginx/conf.d:ro                                                                                                                                                     
      - staticfiles:/static:ro                                                                                                                                                                
      - ./mediafiles:/media:ro                                                                                                                                                                
                                                                                                                                                                                              
volumes:                                                                                                                                                                                      
  nginx_config:                                                                                                                                                                               
  staticfiles:
```
.env file is huge, but largely unchanged from the developer's default example. I can post it if requested.


**Output of `podman version`:**


```
podman version 4.1.1
```

**Output of `podman info --debug`:**

comments.body:
Please check the limits with `cat /proc/self/limits` inside the container.

From your log:
> getrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE): 524288:524288

If that is true you have 524288 open file descriptors. Is it possible that this is a bug with your application instead?

> I have the same exact setup running in docker just fine on another machine, but for podman it fails with this errors.

does it work differently if you run podman as root instead of rootless?  Do you get a different value for the `getrlimit(RLIMIT_NOFILE)` call in the log?

Update: The issue is gone now. I'm not sure what solved it. Podman is the same version. So is the container image. The only difference was that I rebooted the mac yesterday before trying to repeat the issue today. It could have been that podman machine restarted and that fixed it? Maybe a Mac-related issue? I don't know.

Either way, the issue is fixed now so I'm closing this issue. But if anyone wants more info for any reason, I'd be willing to help out.

Hi,

I'm having a similar issue on MacOS with Podman and postgresql. These are `cat /proc/self/limits` inside the QEMU VM:

```
[core@localhost ~]$ cat /proc/self/limits 
Limit                     Soft Limit           Hard Limit           Units     
Max cpu time              unlimited            unlimited            seconds   
Max file size             unlimited            unlimited            bytes     
Max data size             unlimited            unlimited            bytes     
Max stack size            8388608              unlimited            bytes     
Max core file size        unlimited            unlimited            bytes     
Max resident set          unlimited            unlimited            bytes     
Max processes             23160                23160                processes 
Max open files            1024                 524288               files     
Max locked memory         8388608              8388608              bytes     
Max address space         unlimited            unlimited            bytes     
Max file locks            unlimited            unlimited            locks     
Max pending signals       23160                23160                signals   
Max msgqueue size         819200               819200               bytes     
Max nice priority         0                    0                    
Max realtime priority     0                    0                    
Max realtime timeout      unlimited            unlimited            us
```

Maybe `Soft Limit` value 1024 for `Max open files` is too low?

Sorry for pinging @Luap99, but I'm not sure if otherwise you would get a notification from this issue.

This is from a Linux laptop where I've had no troubles so far building same project:

```
Limit                     Soft Limit           Hard Limit           Units
```

@giuseppe do you have any idea of what can be going on? Btw, this is a rootless container.

I'm also having this issue with 1M+ in max open files ulimits. Restarting or recreating podman machine and running it as rootful didn't help.

Strangely, when I replaced local directory mounts with compose named volumes, the errors went away.
